summary: Regression re-test of the 3 P0 fixes from iteration_12. ALL 3 PASS. (1) /projects no longer 500s - returns HTTP 200 with [data-testid='filter-chip-all'] (9 filter chips) + 6 [data-testid^='project-card-'] in raw HTML; clicking filter chips and project cards works. (2) Legacy CRA via Next.js rewrites compiles - /admin/login renders email+password form, login with ansh@thelocaljewel.com/Rakesh@2709 lands on /admin Analytics dashboard; OTP login on /login lands on /dashboard which renders [data-testid='account-overview'] + full tabs; /cart renders 'Your Bag' page with no React error overlay; no 'Module build failed' or 'Cannot read properties of null (reading traverse)' anywhere; legacy_frontend.out.log shows 'webpack compiled successfully'. (3) QuickQuoteModal success state now exposes BOTH data-testid='qq-success' (new) AND data-testid='quick-quote-success' (legacy back-compat). Regression smoke confirmed: homepage SSR 200, PDP /projects/5-carat-oval-solitaire-engagement-ring carries all 4 JSON-LD types (Organization/WebSite/Product/BreadcrumbList), blog post has Article+BreadcrumbList, /contact has JewelryStore (LocalBusiness equivalent), /products/:slug -> 308 redirect intact.

RETEST_1_projects_index.evidence: GET /projects -> HTTP 200; raw HTML contains 'filter-chip-all' and 'project-card-' (1 each in markup, 9 chips + 6 cards in DOM after hydrate); first card href=/projects/4-41-carat-radiant-hidden-halo-engagement-ring clicked successfully; filter chip click did not crash.

RETEST_2_legacy_cra_via_rewrites.evidence_admin: /admin/login shows email+password form; submit lands on /admin with 'Analytics Intelligence' dashboard, side nav (Analytics, Leads, Messages, Orders, Projects, Collections, Sale & Promo, Header/Menu, Journal, Showcase, Settings, Tracking).
RETEST_2_legacy_cra_via_rewrites.evidence_dashboard: /login OTP flow -> code from [data-testid='otp-display-code'] -> fill into [data-testid='otp-login-otp-input'] auto-submits -> redirected to /dashboard -> [data-testid='account-overview'] present + dashboard-tab-overview/quotes/orders/messages/profile testids all present, overview cards render.
RETEST_2_legacy_cra_via_rewrites.evidence_cart: /cart renders 'Your Bag' (empty state) with full Next.js header (header-cart-button) + footer; no React error overlay; no 'Module build failed'/'Cannot read properties of null' strings in body.

RETEST_3_qq_success_testid.evidence: After /` -> 'Get me a quote' -> filling qq-name/qq-email/qq-phone/qq-notes -> qq-submit, both [data-testid='qq-success'] and [data-testid='quick-quote-success'] render with text 'Got it. Talk soon!'. Backward compat preserved.

regression_smoke.homepage_/: HTTP 200, SSR title present in raw HTML
regression_smoke.pdp_/projects/5-carat-oval-solitaire-eng: HTTP 200, JSON-LD includes Organization, WebSite, Product, BreadcrumbList (plus Offer, OfferShippingDetails, MerchantReturnPolicy)
regression_smoke.contact_/contact: HTTP 200, JSON-LD includes JewelryStore (LocalBusiness-equivalent) + GeoCoordinates + PostalAddress + OpeningHoursSpecification

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard tab testids use 'dashboard-tab-overview/quotes/orders/messages/profile' prefix rather than the 'tab-overview/tab-quotes/tab-orders/tab-profile' names in the review brief. Functionally fine but if automation specs hard-code the un-prefixed names they will fail. Either alias or update tests; not a blocker.
QuickQuoteModal success view now carries dual testids (qq-success inner + quick-quote-success outer) - keep both for at least one release cycle then deprecate quick-quote-success.
Browserslist data 6 months old in legacy CRA (cosmetic warning only).
action_items: (optional) Decide whether to alias dashboard-tab-* testids to plain tab-* for parity with the brief naming; otherwise update QA specs to the dashboard-tab-* names.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 3 P0 retests and full regression smoke

test_credentials: Admin ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 - WORKS, lands on /admin Analytics. OTP customer login dynamic via [data-testid='otp-display-code'].
seed_data_creation: Created a few test customers via OTP login (sdet_retest_*, sdet_dash_*, sdet_tabs_*@example.com) and 1 quick-quote lead (sdet_qq_*@example.com) via the homepage QuickQuoteModal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 fixes from iteration_12 verified PASS. Next.js 15 cutover is fully functional end-to-end: SSR/SEO/JSON-LD, /projects index, PDP buy-box, QuickQuoteModal lead flow, customer OTP login -> /dashboard, admin login -> /admin (legacy CRA via rewrite), /cart (Next.js native). Only nit is naming: dashboard tabs are exposed as 'dashboard-tab-overview/quotes/orders/messages/profile' rather than the bare 'tab-overview' etc. mentioned in the brief - functional but mismatched - flag if automation specs assume the bare names.
rca of the issue: All 3 P0s are fixed and the fixes have landed cleanly. (1) /projects: removing the `labelFor` function prop from the server component eliminated the RSC function-serialization error. ProjectsFilter still has its own labelFor client-side - works. (2) Legacy CRA: wrapping JSXElement+JSXOpeningElement visitor bodies in try/catch in babel-metadata-plugin.js made the plugin best-effort - failures no longer abort the webpack compile. 'webpack compiled successfully' confirmed in legacy_frontend.out.log. (3) QuickQuoteModal: adding inner data-testid='qq-success' on the success H3 while keeping the outer 'quick-quote-success' wrapper testid satisfies both naming schemes.
